Ryan's Workout Plan

3-Day Optimized Split — 21 Strength + 6 Warmup Exercises — Zero Muscle Conflicts

Optimized via Simulated Annealing + Bitmask DP — 0 total conflicts
Equipment: Adjustable Dumbbells • Adjustable Bench • Pull-Up Bar • Foam Roller • Medicine Ball • Stationary Bike
Warmup Exercises Before Each Session
#ExerciseTarget AreasEquipment
1Foam RollerQuadriceps, Hamstrings, Calves, Lats, IT BandFoam Roller
2Arm CirclesDeltoids, Trapezius, Rotator CuffBodyweight
3Bird DogsErector Spinae, Gluteus Maximus, Rectus AbdominisBodyweight
4Dead BugsTransverse Abdominis, Rectus Abdominis, ObliquesBodyweight
5Superman HoldErector Spinae, Gluteus Maximus, HamstringsBodyweight
6Static Holds with Weighted Step UpsQuadriceps, Gluteus Maximus, HamstringsDB + Bench
Day 1 0 conflicts
#ExerciseSets x RepsPrimary MusclesEquipment
1Lying Dumbbell Hamstring Curl3 x 10HamstringsDB + Bench
2Seated Dumbbell Curl3 x 10BicepsDB + Bench
3Dumbbell Preacher Curl3 x 10BicepsDB + Bench
4Incline Dumbbell Row3 x 10Latissimus Dorsi, Rear Deltoids, Rhomboids, TrapeziusDB + Incline Bench
5One-Arm Dumbbell Row4 x 8 (each side)Latissimus Dorsi, Rhomboids, TrapeziusDB + Bench
6Plank2 x 1 minErector Spinae, Obliques, Rectus Abdominis, Transverse AbdominisBodyweight
7Dumbbell Bench Press4 x 10Pectoralis MajorDB + Bench
Day 2 0 conflicts
#ExerciseSets x RepsPrimary MusclesEquipment
1Standing Dumbbell Bicep Curl3 x 10BicepsDB
2Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press4 x 10Anterior Deltoids, Lateral DeltoidsDB + Bench
3Standing Dumbbell Calf Raise3 x FailureGastrocnemius, SoleusDB
4Dumbbell Stiff-Leg Deadlift3 x 8-10Glutes, HamstringsDB
5Dumbbell Lying Leg Curl3 x 10HamstringsDB + Bench
6Double Leg Lowering2 x FailureObliques, Rectus Abdominis, Transverse AbdominisBodyweight
7Medicine Ball Russian Twist3 x 30s or 3 x 15sObliques, Rectus AbdominisMedicine Ball
Day 3 0 conflicts
#ExerciseSets x RepsPrimary MusclesEquipment
1Lying Dumbbell Tricep Extension3 x 10TricepsDB + Bench
2Dumbbell Goblet Squat4 x 10Adductors, Glutes, QuadricepsDB
3Dumbbell Leg Extension4 x 10-12QuadricepsDB + Bench
4Dumbbell Crunch3 x FailureRectus AbdominisDB
5Dumbbell Chest Fly3 x FailurePectoralis MajorDB + Bench
6Dumbbell Tricep Kickback3 x 8 (each arm)TricepsDB + Bench
7Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat3 x 10 (each leg)Adductors, Glutes, QuadricepsDB + Bench
Optimization Method: 21 strength exercises pooled and assigned to 3 days (7/7/7) using simulated annealing (200,000 iterations x 5 runs). Within-day ordering solved exactly via bitmask dynamic programming. Constraint: duplicate hamstring curls on separate days. Result: 0 conflicts across all 3 days.
Weekly Muscle Activation Scores
Scoring: +3 per primary activation, +1 per secondary activation across all 21 strength exercises

High (10+)

Moderate (3–5)
Low (1–2)
Key Insights: Biceps (12) and Rectus Abdominis (12) receive the most activation. Hamstrings score 8 with 2 primary exercises (Stiff-Leg Deadlift for hip extension, Hamstring Curls for knee flexion) plus secondary activation from squats. Core scores 9 despite never being a primary target — it stabilizes in nearly half of all exercises. Muscles scoring below 3 (Calves, Wrist Flexors, Upper Chest, Teres Major) are either small stabilizers or adequately covered by compound movements.
